backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing an e-commerce system with product management, shopping cart, user profiles, Stripe payment integration via HTTP outcalls, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting Stripe payment integration verification in production, listing related frontend files, components (stripe@3.0.0, http-outcalls@3.0.0, authorization@4.0.0), and test ID REQ-2 with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing routing, Stripe integration, payment flows, cart management, admin authentication, and UI components with yellow/gold theming.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark mode themes using neutral grayscale values (no yellow theme colors present in this file).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with title 'GLORY 123' and root div mounting point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (products, cart, payment, success/failure pages, admin) with shared Layout component including Header, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying GLORY 123 branding, contact info (phone: 9892246308, address: R.N.15 DHARAVI MUMBAI), social media links, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with GLORY 123 branding, navigation links to Products and Admin pages, and shopping cart icon with dynamic item count badge.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSetup.tsx: Admin component for configuring Stripe integration by entering secret key and allowed countries, with conditional rendering that hides when Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: React hook that manages admin authentication state using sessionStorage, providing login/logout functions and checking for existing sessions on mount.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and delegation validity using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations including products, cart operations, cart total calculation, Stripe configuration, and checkout session creation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a yellow-themed color palette for both light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, and semantic colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin page component with password-protected login (hardcoded 'admin123') and a form for adding products with name, category, price, description, and image upload functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, item removal, and total calculation, showing an empty state when cart is empty.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying a success message with navigation buttons to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure page with error explanation, troubleshooting suggestions, and buttons to retry payment or return to cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that integrates Stripe checkout, displays cart summary, and handles creating checkout sessions with redirect to Stripe's hosted payment page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Success confirmation page shown after payment completion, invalidates cart cache and provides navigation to home or cart.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page displaying full product information, image, description, and add-to-cart functionality with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Main product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and responsive grid layout of product cards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and custom font stacks for a modern UI design system.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking a deployment error fix request, including a Stripe payment integration feature and a pending requirement to diagnose and resolve production deployment issues.
